query:
-- Check sasboss_invoices for UCXcel items
SELECT 
  si.enterprise_id, si.enterprise_name, si.product_name, si.service_ref_id,
  si.monthly_recurring, si.invoice_date
FROM sasboss_invoices si
WHERE si.product_name IN ('UCXcel Essential', 'UCXcel Webex Basic')
ORDER BY si.enterprise_name, si.product_name
LIMIT 20;
